date_of_occurrence.date_of_occurrence: The date when the marine incident took place, formatted as day-month-year.

classification.classification: The severity category assigned to the marine casualty, such as 'Very Serious Marine Casualty'.

type_of_vessel.type_of_vessel: The name and type abbreviation (e.g., TU for tug, CS for cargo ship, TA for tanker, SV for supply vessel) of the vessel(s) involved in the incident.

url.url: A web link to the official investigation report or documentation for the incident.

period.period: The month and year (YYYY-MM) to which the performance metrics correspond.

tier.tier: The market segment or classification of the hotel property, such as UPSCALE, MID-TIER, LUXURY, or ECONOMY.

revpar.revpar: Revenue per available room, calculated as the average revenue generated per available room per day, regardless of occupancy.

year.year: The calendar year for which the data is recorded, ranging from 2014 to 2016.

year.year: The calendar year for which the passenger counts are recorded.

year.year: The calendar year in which the data was recorded.

contributor.contributor: Individuals or organizations that own, donated, or otherwise contributed to the item.
